claim: Building a personal AI assistant with speech-to-text (STT), LLM inference, and text-to-speech (TTS) requires three components; total latency depends heavily on which services you pick.
actionable: For fast personal AI assistants, benchmark three setups: Groq+ElevenLabs, Pure OpenAI, AssemblyAI+ElevenLabs; pick based on speed/cost tradeoff for your use case.
source_title: CONTROL your Personal AI Assistant with GPT-4o mini

claim: OpenAI (GPT-4o mini + OpenAI voice) is fastest for personal AI assistants (19 seconds for 3-turn conversation); trade-off is limited voice variety vs ElevenLabs customization.
actionable: For speed-critical personal AI, use Pure OpenAI stack; for voice customization, combine Groq+ElevenLabs or OpenAI+ElevenLabs (slower but more voices).
source_title: CONTROL your Personal AI Assistant with GPT-4o mini

claim: A well-crafted system prompt for personal AI assistants should include assistant name, user name, response style preferences, and previous interaction history; use XML formatting for production.
actionable: When building personal AI assistants, craft a single-turn prompt that embeds previous interactions and ends with a leading command (e.g., 'Your response:'); prefer XML for structure.
source_title: CONTROL your Personal AI Assistant with GPT-4o mini

claim: Voice-first workflows (speak→transcribe→think→speak) require low latency; transcription is often the bottleneck (2.7s AssemblyAI free tier vs 1.7s OpenAI).
actionable: When building voice-first assistants, prioritize STT latency; use OpenAI's speech-to-text over free AssemblyAI tier; ElevenLabs TTS is consistent across setups (~3s).
source_title: CONTROL your Personal AI Assistant with GPT-4o mini

claim: Building your own personal AI assistant (outside walled gardens) allows customization and control; viable with commodity tools (GPT-4o mini, ElevenLabs, open-source frameworks).
actionable: Don't rely solely on proprietary voice assistants (Apple, Google, OpenAI); build your own control plane using commodity APIs and open frameworks.
source_title: CONTROL your Personal AI Assistant with GPT-4o mini
